					<div id="contentSub"><div id="mw-content-subtitle"></div></div>
					
					
					<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr" data-mw-parsoid-version="0.23.0.0-alpha19" data-mw-html-version="2.8.0"><section data-mw-section-id="0" id="mwAQ"><p id="mwAg">The postal codes of <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Switzerland" title="Switzerland" id="mwAw">Swiss</a> <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cantons_of_Switzerland" title="Cantons of Switzerland" id="mwBA">cantons</a>:</p>
<ul id="mwBQ"><li id="mwBg">1xxx - Region Western Switzerland (South)
<ul id="mwBw"><li id="mwCA">10xx - Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lausanne" title="Lausanne" id="mwCQ">Lausanne</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Echallens" title="Echallens" id="mwCg">Echallens</a> (North-West)</li>
<li id="mwCw">11xx - Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Morges" title="Morges" id="mwDA">Morges</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rolle" title="Rolle" id="mwDQ">Rolle</a></li>
<li id="mwDg">12xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Canton_of_Geneva" title="Canton of Geneva" class="mw-redirect" id="mwDw">Canton of Geneva</a> and Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nyon" title="Nyon" id="mwEA">Nyon</a></li>
<li id="mwEQ">13xx - Region between Lausanne and Yverdon, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jura_Mountains" title="Jura Mountains" id="mwEg">Jura</a> side (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cossonay" title="Cossonay" id="mwEw">Cossonay</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orbe,_Switzerland" title="Orbe, Switzerland" class="mw-redirect" id="mwFA">Orbe</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vallorbe" title="Vallorbe" id="mwFQ">Vallorbe</a>)</li>
<li id="mwFg">14xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yverdon" title="Yverdon" class="mw-redirect" id="mwFw">Yverdon</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Estavayer-le-Lac" title="Estavayer-le-Lac" id="mwGA">Estavayer-le-Lac</a> (VD/FR)</li>
<li id="mwGQ">15xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moudon" title="Moudon" id="mwGg">Moudon</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucens" title="Lucens" id="mwGw">Lucens</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avenches" title="Avenches" id="mwHA">Avenches</a> (VD/FR)</li>
<li id="mwHQ">16xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Romont,_Fribourg" title="Romont, Fribourg" id="mwHg">Romont</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bulle" title="Bulle" id="mwHw">Bulle</a> (VD/FR)</li>
<li id="mwIA">17xx - Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fribourg" title="Fribourg" class="mw-disambig" id="mwIQ">Fribourg</a> to <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lake_Murten" title="Lake Murten" class="mw-redirect" id="mwIg">Lake Murten</a> (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Münchenwiler" title="Münchenwiler" id="mwIw">Münchenwiler</a>)</li>
<li id="mwJA">18xx - Eastern shore of <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lake_Geneva" title="Lake Geneva" id="mwJQ">Lake Geneva</a> (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vevey" title="Vevey" id="mwJg">Vevey</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Montreux" title="Montreux" id="mwJw">Montreux</a>), <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chablais?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Chablais (not yet started)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" id="mwKA" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Chablais"]}}">Chablais</a> (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aigle" title="Aigle" id="mwKQ">Aigle</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Monthey,_Switzerland" title="Monthey, Switzerland" class="mw-redirect" id="mwKg">Monthey</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saint-Maurice,_Switzerland" title="Saint-Maurice, Switzerland" id="mwKw">St. Maurice</a> VD/VS)</li>
<li id="mwLA">19xx - Lower Valais (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Martigny,_Switzerland" title="Martigny, Switzerland" id="mwLQ">Martigny</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sion,_Switzerland" title="Sion, Switzerland" id="mwLg">Sion</a>) without Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sierre" title="Sierre" id="mwLw">Sierre</a></li></ul></li>
<li id="mwMA">2xxx - Region Western Switzerland (North)
<ul id="mwMQ"><li id="mwMg">20xx - Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neuchâtel" title="Neuchâtel" id="mwMw">Neuchâtel</a></li>
<li id="mwNA">21xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Val_de_Travers?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Val de Travers (not yet started)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" id="mwNQ" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Val de Travers"]}}">Val de Travers</a> NE</li>
<li id="mwNg">22xx - Upper <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Val_de_Ruz?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Val de Ruz (not yet started)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" id="mwNw" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Val de Ruz"]}}">Val de Ruz</a>,</li>
<li id="mwOA">23xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/La_Chaux-de-Fonds" title="La Chaux-de-Fonds" id="mwOQ">La Chaux-de-Fonds</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Franches-Montagnes?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Franches-Montagnes (not yet started)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" id="mwOg" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Franches-Montagnes"]}}">Franches-Montagnes</a></li>
<li id="mwOw">24xx - <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Le_Locle" title="Le Locle" id="mwPA">Le Locle</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/La_Sagne" title="La Sagne" id="mwPQ">La Sagne</a></li>
<li id="mwPg">25xx - Region <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Biel/Bienne" title="Biel/Bienne" id="mwPw">Biel/Bienne</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lake_Biel" title="Lake Biel" id="mwQA">Lake Biel</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Grenchen" title="Grenchen" id="mwQQ">Grenchen</a></li>
